signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders with Alpenglow Upgrade Boosting Network Performance | Y
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record of 167 Million Monthly Token Holders with Alpenglow Upgrade Boosting Network Performance | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][5]

On April 14, 2026, Solana achieved a record 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions, alongside $1.1 trillion in Q1 economic activity (up 6,500% quarter-over-quarter), signaling massive adoption that could shift

signals.headline: Confidence:** HIGH
signals.raw:
Confidence:** HIGH

The two-week ceasefire announced April 7 is set to expire early next week[1]. The US and Iran are pursuing fresh negotiations after talks in Islamabad over the weekend ended without a deal[1]. According to US officials, negotiations would need to occur "this week" to have any chance of progress before the ceasefire expires[1].
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
Trump announces US x Iran ceasefire end by April 21, 2026?
US x Iran permanent peace deal by April 22, 2026?
